query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.portalStatus,
  acp.uniqueAgentId,
  acp.agentStatus,
  acp.id AS crm_profile_id,
  CASE 
    WHEN acp.id IS NULL THEN 'no_crm_profile'
    ELSE 'crm_profile_exists_no_id'
  END AS reason
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND (acp.uniqueAgentId IS NULL OR acp.uniqueAgentId = '')
ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;

  CASE

    ELSE 'crm_profile_exists_no_id'
  END AS reason
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND (acp.uniqueAgentId IS NULL OR acp.uniqueAgentId = '')
ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
